channel.title: Comments on: Idaho Beer – Moscow Edition
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Marian
item.dc:creator: Marian
item.description:
Hi Mickey!
I'm saving the photo of you on this so I can tell people what you REALLY do for a living! (Ha!)
Hope your latest "road trip" was a breeze and that this episode does good things for all!
Talk soon.
Marian
item.content:encoded:
Hi Mickey!

I’m saving the photo of you on this so I can tell people what you REALLY do for a living! (Ha!)

Hope your latest “road trip” was a breeze and that this episode does good things for all!

Talk soon.

Marian
